title: Raya Tak Jadi
overview: A businessman named Leo who will be at a great loss because of the containers containing the dates he wants to sell before the election have not arrive. Therefore, he planned to hold a feast by abducting the Great Seal Keeper, Hj.Ehsan. Leo has directed his two employees, Ali and Abu to carry out the abduction. They both succeeded in kidnapping Hj.Ehsan but problems arose when Ali and Abu accidentally exchanged taxi with Hj.Ehsan inside and with Shuib, a taxi driver.
